meta.siteDescription: RAE Pathways is your trusted partner in achieving your Australian dream. We guide you every step of the way.

home.eyebrow: Your journey to Australia starts here
home.title: Migration & Visa Experts You Can Trust
home.description: RAE Pathways is your trusted partner in achieving your Australian dream. We guide you every step of the way.
home.servicesDescription: Expert guidance across migration pathways — choose the service that fits your goals.
home.whyDescription: Australia offers a high quality of life, world-class education, excellent healthcare, and endless opportunities.

services.pageDescription: We offer a wide range of visa and migration services tailored to your individual needs.
services.readyBody: Book a consultation and we'll assess your options for {service}.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: We're here to help you with your migration journey. Contact us today for expert advice.
contact.success: Thanks — your message has been sent. We'll be in touch soon.

consultation.title: Book a Consultation
consultation.description: Tell us about your goals and the service you need. Our migration team will review your details and get back to you.
consultation.heading: Speak with our migration team
consultation.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your goals, timeline, or questions...
consultation.helper: Choose a service and share a short message about your situation.
consultation.success: Thanks — your consultation request has been sent. We'll contact you soon.

highlights.two: Personalised advice for your visa pathway
highlights.three: Clear next steps after your enquiry

requirements.title: Visa Requirements
requirements.description: Each visa has specific eligibility criteria and documentation. Below are the general requirements for common visa types.
requirements.noteBody: Requirements may vary depending on your individual circumstances and the visa subclass. Please contact us for a detailed assessment of your case.

blog.title: Latest News & Insights
blog.description: Stay updated with the latest migration news, visa updates, and helpful tips for your Australian journey.
blog.advice: For personalised advice on your situation, get in touch with our registered migration team. We'll help you understand the latest requirements and the pathway that fits your goals.
